title: Cypherpunk Foundations
description: Start with philosophy and history — understand why privacy, cryptography, and code matter before touching any wallet.

title: Bitcoin Sovereignty Path
description: From whitepaper to full node — learn Bitcoin technically and run your own infrastructure.

title: Monero Privacy Path
description: Understand private money — Moneropedia concepts, wallet setup, Tor routing, and running your own node.

title: Practical OpSec Path
description: Hands-on operational security — GPG, Tor, Tails, and compartmentalized computing.

title: Bitcoin Privacy Techniques
description: Bitcoin is transparent by default — learn CoinJoin, privacy wallets, and techniques to reclaim fungibility.

title: Deep Cryptography
description: Mathematical foundations for understanding protocols under the hood — university-level theory.
